attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.COST_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.OPERATION_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.DEPARTMENT_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.LEVEL_TYPE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ITEM_UNITS, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ACTIVITY_UNITS, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.USAGE_RATE_OR_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.BASIS_TYPE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.BASIS_RESOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.BASIS_FACTOR, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.NET_YIELD_OR_SHRINKAGE_FACTOR, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ITEM_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.COST_ELEMENT_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ROLLUP_SOURCE_TYPE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ACTIVITY_CONTEXT, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.YIELDED_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.VENDOR_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ALLOCATION_PERCENT, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.VENDOR_SITE_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS,
 (
 select ATTRIBUTE15,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS
 minus
 select ATTRIBUTE15,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ATTRIBUTE15 = STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE15 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COST_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME
